sections.heading: How To Read The Current Results

callGraph.callee:
party_swings.groupby(["state", "constituency_id"])
        .agg(
            max_positive_swing=("swing", "max"),
            max_negative_swing=("swing", "min"),
            avg_abs_swing=("swing", lambda x: x.abs().mean()),
        )
        .reset_index

rows
    .map((row) => row[field])
    .filter((value) => value !== null && value !== undefined && Number.isFinite(Number(value)))
    .map

bundle.state_party_swings
    .filter((row) => row.state_key === selectedStateKey)
    .filter((row) => Math.max(Number(row.seats_2019 || 0), Number(row.seats_2024 || 0)) >= minSeats)
    .sort
